name: accordion
description: Disclosure list with single or multiple open items.

name: alert
description: Inline callout for contextual feedback; danger/warning announce assertively via role=alert.

name: avatar
description: Image avatar with automatic initials fallback when the image is missing or fails to load.

name: badge
description: Compact status label with tone and variant axes.

name: breadcrumb
description: Navigation trail; the last item is marked aria-current=page automatically.

name: button
description: Action button with variants, sizes, and a loading state that preserves width and sets aria-busy.

name: card
description: Composable surface: Root, Header, Title, Description, Content, Footer parts.

name: checkbox
description: Checkbox built on a visually-hidden native input: native form submission and accessibility for free.

name: dialog
description: Modal dialog driven by a core state machine; focus trap, scroll lock, Escape and backdrop dismissal handled automatically.

name: kbd
description: Keyboard key cap for shortcuts in docs and menus.

name: menu
description: Dropdown action menu (WAI-ARIA menu pattern): roving focus, Home/End, Escape, outside-click dismissal.

name: pagination
description: Page navigation with sibling windows and ellipsis collapsing (logic lives in @tessera/core).

name: popover
description: Non-modal floating panel anchored to its trigger (floating-ui positioning with flip/shift).

name: progress
description: Determinate or indeterminate progress bar with full progressbar semantics.

name: radio-group
description: Compound radio group built on native radio inputs (arrow-key navigation comes from the browser).

name: select
description: Single-select listbox (combobox pattern): typeahead, disabled-item skipping, keyboard navigation, anchored positioning.

name: separator
description: Horizontal or vertical rule with proper separator semantics.

name: skeleton
description: Loading placeholder with text/circle/rect variants and reduced-motion support.

name: slider
description: Single-value slider on a native range input: browser-grade keyboard, touch, and a11y.

name: spinner
description: Indeterminate loading indicator with an accessible label.

name: switch
description: On/off toggle backed by a native role=switch input.

name: table
description: Composable data table: Root (scroll container), Header, Body, Row, Head, Cell, Caption.

name: tabs
description: WAI-ARIA tabs with roving focus and automatic activation.

name: tag
description: Chip for filters and selections, optionally dismissible.

name: text-field
description: Labeled text input with description and error messaging, all wired with aria-describedby automatically.

name: textarea
description: Multi-line text input with label, description, and error wiring (mirrors TextField).

name: toast
description: Imperative notifications backed by a framework-agnostic queue with auto-dismiss, hover pause/resume, and a visible-toast cap.

name: tooltip
description: Hover/focus tooltip with hover-intent delays driven by a four-state core machine (no flicker on quick re-entry).
